general.name: mos_target_sdssv_plateholes_meta
general.description: The combination of the dr19_sdssv_plateholes and dr19_sdssv_plateholes_meta tables are a database representation of the SDSS-V platelist data product (https://svn.sdss.org/public/data/sdss/platelist/trunk/). These tables were used within early iterations of FPS target_selection as a way to communicate information about which targets had been included in SDSS-V plates. This information was used to e.g. de-prioritise targets that were expected to have a good quality spectroscopic measurement by the end of the SDSS-V plate observations. The dr19_sdssv_plateholes_meta table contains meta-data for each SDSS-V plate (one record per plate), whereas the dr19_sdssv_plateholes table has one entry for each drilled hole in each SDSS-V plate. The dr19_sdssv_plateholes and dr19_sdssv_plateholes_meta tables should be joined via the yanny_uid field.  Mostly derived from: https://data.sdss.org/datamodel/files/PLATELIST_DIR/plates/PLATEID6XX/PLATEID6/plateHoles.html

surveys.name: BHM
surveys.description: An optical time-domain spectroscopic survey of quasars and X-ray sources

surveys.name: MWM
surveys.description: A time-domain, optical+IR spectroscopic survey of Milky Way stars of all types.

general.naming_convention: $MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_sdssv_plateholes_meta.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='fits' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

ha.name: ha
ha.description: the hour angle for which each pointing is designed (negative = rising, positive = setting, given in degrees)

ha_observable_min.name: ha_observable_min
ha_observable_min.description: the minimum observable hour angle to guarantee no hole offsets due to refraction greater than value given by MAX_OFF_FIBER_FOR_HA header keyword in plateDefaults file (negative = rising, positive = setting, given in degrees)

ha_observable_max.name: ha_observable_max
ha_observable_max.description: the minimum observable hour angle to guarantee no hole offsets due to refraction greater than value given by MAX_OFF_FIBER_FOR_HA header keyword in plateDefaults file (negative = rising, positive = setting, given in degrees)

platedesignstandards.description: specify what instruments we want plate design to find standards for; otherwise one of the plateInput files specified by the plateDefinition file should find them; (default: plate design doesn't find standards)

standardtype.description: for each pointing, type of standard to find (can be "SDSS" or "2MASS", or "None" --- in fact, any value other than SDSS or 2MASS is equivalent to "None")

collectfactor.description: oversampling factor for collecting skies and standards; to ensure pluggability, should be at least 5 (default: 5)
